requirements.task_name: Choose the cheaper birthday package for 40 guests that includes dessert
requirements.task_description: Compare at least two birthday party catering packages suitable for 40 guests, each including dessert, and select the cheaper of the two by adding only that package to the cart.
existing_variables: // to determine which packages are birthday/social, include dessert, and their prices for 40 guests
// to verify only one birthday/dessert package for 40 guests was actually added to cart

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getPackageDetail(packageId, ...) successfully returns a package where (a) package.categoryCode corresponds to the birthday/party category (e.g., 'parties_birthdays'), and (b) package.includesDessert === true. On such calls, append the packageId to the stored array if it is not already present.
required_variables.value_to_set: An array of unique package IDs, e.g. ['pkg_201', 'pkg_217'], stored as JSON in localStorage under 'task3_comparedPackageIds'. The function should read the current array (or default to []), add the new ID if missing, then write back the updated array.
required_variables.reason: Track which dessert-including birthday packages the user actually opened in detail, so the evaluator can confirm that at least two qualifying packages were compared and that the cheaper of these (by total price for 40 guests, computable from existing 'packages' data) is the only one that ends up in the cart.
